full_text:
Miao Ze
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Miao Ze. Informed Cao Cao of Huang Kui’s plot so he could marry Li Chunxiang. Miao Ze is a fictional character. Miao Ze was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Miao Ze lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
